metadata.title: Book Store | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered bookstore management platform for all your retail operations - from point of sale and inventory to loyalty programs and real-time reporting.

hero.title: Book Store
hero.description: Organize ISBN codes, simplify bookstore checkout, keep stock accurate, and deliver better customer service from one unified AdonERP workspace.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP gives bookstore teams the kind of visibility that makes daily decisions faster. From bestseller trends to shelf-level stock control, every move feels simpler and more precise.

demo.footerMessage: Fast checkout, loyalty perks, and live stock in one bookstore flow.

scanSection.title: Scan it, that's it
scanSection.description: Speed matters. Scan your book's ISBN code to create new products instantly, fetch references from distributors, and manage editions faster in a catalog that stays accurate.

inventorySection.title: Shelf control is the key to success
inventorySection.description: Maintain optimal stock levels by generating smart replenishment orders when a title drops below threshold, so fast-moving books never leave your shelves empty.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Everything you need to manage your bookstore in one place - from checkout to replenishment.

list.title: Reporting
list.description: Track your sales trends, bestsellers, and stock performance in one place.

list.title: Multiple cashiers
list.description: Assign secure cashier profiles with badges or PINs for every shift.

list.title: Loyalty programs
list.description: Reward returning readers with points, tiered perks, and member pricing.

list.title: Sell consignment products
list.description: Receive, store, and settle consignment books with clear partner visibility.

list.title: Gift cards
list.description: Create, top up, and redeem physical or digital gift cards in seconds.

list.title: Pricelists
list.description: Set flexible pricing by customer type, channel, event, or campaign.

appsSection.title: One app for
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your retail operation, finance, supplier flows, and customer communication.

ctaSection.title: Grow your bookstore with clearer operations
ctaSection.description: Bring sales, stock, and team coordination into one workflow that is easier to scale across every branch.

footerCta.title: Open your next chapter
footerCta.subtitle: with AdonERP
footerCta.description: Launch a bookstore workflow that helps your team sell faster, stock smarter, and scale from one branch to many without adding chaos.
